steps.title: Read the table
steps.content: The table gives three points: $(0,22)$, $(1,23)$, and $(2,24)$.

steps.title: Find slope and intercept
steps.content: Using $(0,22)$ and $(1,23)$, the slope is $m=\frac{23-22}{1-0}=1$. The $y$-intercept is the $y$-value at $x=0$, which is $22$. So $y=x+22$. Check $(2,24)$: $2+22=24$. Confirmed.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $y=x+22$ — slope $1$, intercept $22$. Matches all three points.
  • B) $y=24x$ — at $x=0$ gives $y=0$, not $22$. Eliminated.
  • C) $y=24x+2$ — at $x=0$ gives $y=2$, not $22$. Eliminated.
  • D) $y=22x$ — at $x=0$ gives $y=0$, not $22$. Eliminated.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
